entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
